_notes.purpose: Claude Code project settings for codexcw2. Read AGENTS.md first.
hooks: SessionStart prints a one-screen orientation so every session begins aware of the canonical guide.
PreToolUse blocks edits to generated/build output.

hooks.command:
printf '
=== c3-oss/codexcw2 ===
- Canonical guide: AGENTS.md (read it before substantial changes).
- Toolchain: devbox + just. Rust core in crates/codexcw; bindings in bindings/{node,python}.
- Conventional Commits with required scope are enforced by commitlint.
- Local CI lane: `just ci`.
===

'

printf '
=== c3-oss/codexcw2 ===
- Canonical guide: AGENTS.md (read it before substantial changes).
- Toolchain: devbox + just. Rust core in crates/codexcw; bindings in bindings/{node,python}.
- Conventional Commits with required scope are enforced by commitlint.
- Local CI lane: `just ci`.
===

'

if printf '%s' "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '"file_path"[^,]*"[^"]*/(dist|target|node_modules)/'; then printf 'BLOCKED: dist/, target/, and node_modules/ are generated. Do not edit by hand.\n' >&2; exit 2; fi
